summary: Targeted regression for Render deployment fix: emergentintegrations removed, replaced with official anthropic SDK + graceful degradation. All acceptance criteria verified.

minor.issue: Streams '[AI error: AuthenticationError]' when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is present but not a valid Anthropic key. Intentional graceful-degradation per spec (no 500). Consider filtering EMERGENT_LLM_KEY fallback out on deploy so the friendlier 'AI is not configured' message shows instead.

verifications.no_emergentintegrations_code_refs: PASS (only appears in docstring of ai_service.py)
verifications.ai_chat_no_500: PASS (200 SSE stream, graceful [AI error: AuthenticationError] payload — no ImportError, no crash)
verifications.ai_price_predict_no_500: PASS (200 with prediction field: 'Suggested: market range varies... AI temporarily unavailable: AuthenticationError')
verifications.non_ai_endpoints: PASS (auth login, /me, dashboard/stats, products, payments/config all 200)

action_items: Optional: On Render, unset EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (or set only ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) so users see the friendlier 'AI is not configured...' fallback rather than 'AuthenticationError'. Not blocking deployment.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_service.py falls back to EMERGENT_LLM_KEY as if it were an Anthropic key. In the current dev env this masks the intended 'not configured' path and instead surfaces an AuthenticationError message. Fine because it's still non-500, but the fallback semantics are questionable — better to drop the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY fallback entirely for production correctness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deployment bug-fix (Render compat) verified. AI endpoints intentionally degrade gracefully because no valid ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set. Full farmer regression suite (14 tests) all passing. Suite still has reviews/payments/cloudinary/csrf/lockout tests untouched by this fix — no need to rerun.
rca of the issue: Original: requirements.txt referenced emergentintegrations==0.2.0 (Emergent internal, not on PyPI) causing Render `pip install` to fail. Fix: replaced with official anthropic SDK, wrapped in /app/backend/ai_service.py exposing stream_reply() and one_shot() with graceful degradation. server.py updated imports and switched EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read from os.environ[...] to os.environ.get(...,'') so missing key no longer crashes boot. Verified: pip install clean, backend boots, AI endpoints degrade to 200 responses rather than 500, non-AI endpoints unchanged.
